title: PerfPlus
description: Simple modpack which includes performace and lots of Qol mods.
body:
**This modpack is © NolemAir, all rights reserved.  
All included mods are the property of their respective authors and are licensed separately.  
This pack uses Modrinth’s manifest system and does not redistribute any mod files directly.**
